core_mechanism: spectral relaxation of a balanced graph-cut: eigendecomposition of a graph Laplacian, using its lowest nontrivial eigenvectors as a low-dimensional embedding that separates weakly-connected groups
brief_reason: The abstract centers on constructing graph Laplacians and deriving the clustering algorithms from their eigenstructure, i.e. using Laplacian eigenvectors as a continuous relaxation of partitioning a weighted similarity graph.
